commit_scope: Bind the Form ideas graph projection into the production kernel-router manifest as a native preview route.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/cell-log-store.fk form-stdlib/storage-port.fk form-stdlib/storage-port-file.fk form-stdlib/graph-node-port.fk form-stdlib/ideas-graph-projection.fk form-stdlib/tests/ideas-graph-projection-band.fk
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_ideas_graph_projection_form.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_ideas_graph_projection_form.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py
local_validation.summary: The production kernel-router manifest now binds GET /api/ideas/graph-projection to route_ideas_graph_projection. The route projects fixture graph rows into an IdeaPortfolioResponse-shaped JSON body, filters the non-idea concept row, emits valid IdeaStage values, and is reported as kernel-first capable. Existing /api/ideas traffic still fans out to FastAPI.

known_limitations.observed: The new manifest route is fixture-backed. Live DB-backed /api/ideas still fans out to FastAPI until a live graph storage carrier replaces the fixture rows.

cd form && ./validate.sh ../deploy/kernel-router/production-routes.fk still diverges on cross-kernel closure identity rendering for route tables. The Rust kernel-router route-level smoke is the behavior proof for this manifest binding.

The prompt gate initially blocked on a deleted-upstream sibling branch and a detached temp worktree. The sibling BML ledger branch was pushed upstream and the clean temp worktree was attached to main before this route work resumed.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of this route binding commit and GitHub checks on PR #2586.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted for this fixture-backed native preview route.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: GET /api/ideas/graph-projection is now a kernel-first capable native Form route that returns an IdeaPortfolioResponse-shaped JSON body from graph-node-shaped fixture rows. The route returns HTTP 200 with X-Form-Router: native-kernel; the existing public /api/ideas route remains unchanged.
test_flows: curl -i http://127.0.0.1:19184/api/ideas/graph-projection -> HTTP 200, Content-Type application/json, X-Form-Router: native-kernel, total_ideas=2, validated_ideas=1
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_ideas_graph_projection_form.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py -> 14 passed

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; CI and deployment validation remain pending.
